params.amount: Amount to transfer. Must be ≤ claimableBalance().
params.recipient: Where to send the G$ (typically UBIClaimV2 itself).

params.dAppRecipient: Where to send the dApp's share
Where the dApp's share is sent.
params.token: The ERC-20 token in which the fee is denominated.

claimableBalance().notice: Returns the G$ balance held in this contract available for UBI claims.         UBIClaimV2 queries this to determine if supplemental pool funds are ready.

registerDApp(address,string).notice: Register a dApp. For tracking and governance.

releaseToUBI(address,uint256).notice: Transfer G$ held by this contract to `recipient` for UBI pool funding.         Restricted to ubiClaimContract (UBIClaimV2) only — prevents arbitrary         callers from draining accumulated G$ to attacker-controlled addresses.

setGoodDollar(address).notice: Update the GoodDollar token address. Required when GDT is redeployed         (e.g. after devnet resets). Immutability prevented live updates — GOO-402.

splitFee(uint256,address).notice: Split a fee payment. Called by dApps after collecting fees.

splitFeeToken(uint256,address,address).notice: Token-agnostic fee split. Use this when fees are denominated in any         ERC-20 other than G$ (e.g. gUSD from VaultManager stability fees).         UBI share is transferred to `ubiRecipient`; protocol and dApp shares         go to their respective addresses. Does NOT call fundUBIPool().

ubiClaimContract().notice: The only address allowed to call releaseToUBI() (typically UBIClaimV2).

ubiRecipient().notice: Where non-G$ UBI shares (e.g. gUSD) are sent.         Defaults to address(0) (no-op) until set by admin.

withdrawETH().notice: Withdraw accumulated native ETH to the protocol treasury.
